inputs.label: Beam Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of the beam between supports in meters.

inputs.label: Cross-Section Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of the beam rectangular cross-section in meters.

inputs.label: Cross-Section Height
inputs.businessContext: Height of the beam rectangular cross-section in meters.

inputs.label: Distributed Load
inputs.businessContext: Uniformly distributed load applied along the beam length in Newtons per meter.

breakdown.label: Maximum Bending Moment
breakdown.description: Maximum bending moment at midspan in Newton-meters.

breakdown.label: Section Modulus
breakdown.description: Elastic section modulus of the rectangular cross-section in cubic meters.
